root_cause: The MobiDB REST API at mobidb.bio.unipd.it appears to be down or unreachable. All requests to https://mobidb.bio.unipd.it/api/download time out at the TCP connection level (no HTTPS handshake, no HTTP response). Tested on 2026-03-02 with P04637 and P00533 - both time out within 10s. The MobiDB web UI at mobidb.org/P04637 returns 404 for the /entry/{acc} path, suggesting a URL schema change. Note: mobidb.org/P04637 may work differently than the bulk download API.
retry_notes: Check if mobidb.bio.unipd.it is back online or if a new API endpoint is available at mobidb.org. The MobiDB project may have migrated API infrastructure.
workaround: Use UniProt /features endpoint (EBIProteins_get_features) with category=DOMAINS_AND_SITES for structural data, or DisProt API for curated disorder annotations. For PTM data, use EBIProteins_get_proteomics_ptm.
investigation_notes: mobidb.bio.unipd.it is unreachable at TCP level (no connection established)
Previously worked in prior sessions (agent reports from Round 26A confirm 100% timeout)

attempted_config.name: MobiDB_get_protein
attempted_config.description: Get protein disorder data from MobiDB
